# Create high-level product comparison

## Task

Update:

`reports/comparisons/high-level-product-comparison.md`

Use `templates/high-level-comparison-template.md`.

## Requirements

1. Compare products at product/feature-group level.
2. Keep rows normalized across third-party and 3t products.
3. Highlight parity, differentiators, and strategic gaps.
4. Include source traceability to product reports and feature artifacts.
5. Add a `Navigation` section linking cumulative report, low-level comparison, and major product reports.
